india_trends.title: Global consumer companies stay bullish on India
india_trends.summary: Global consumer firms are seeing strong demand in India. Companies like Mondelez, Coca-Cola, Pernod Ricard, Reckitt Benckiser, and Carlsberg reported double-digit growth in the March quarter. This follows a period of volatility. Recent GST changes are now helping consumption. India remains a key gro

india_trends.title: US Federal Reserve keeps rates unchanged for third straight meeting: 5 key takeaways from April policy
india_trends.summary: The US Federal Reserve on Wednesday, 29 April, avoided surprising markets by keeping the federal funds rate unchanged for the third consecutive meeting at 3.5%–3.75% amdi increased risk of inflation rising due to higher global energy prices.

india_trends.title: US Federal Reserve holds interest rates steady, signaling caution as chair Jerome Powell nears exit
india_trends.summary: The Federal Reserve held interest rates steady for the third time, citing global risks like rising energy prices and supply disruptions. Policymakers are balancing inflation concerns with the potential impact of aggressive hikes on economic growth. This pause offers near-term stability for Indian ma

india_trends.title: West Asia crisis drives up fuel losses for OMCs: ICRA
india_trends.summary: At crude prices of $120-125 per barrel, marketing margins are estimated at around negative Rs 14 per litre for petrol and Rs 18 per litre for diesel, according to the ratings agency. india_trends.title: India needs rapid scale-up in power capacity: Sagar Adani
india_trends.summary: Speaking at The Economist's Resilient Futures Summit in New Delhi, he said the ability to create large-scale infrastructure with purpose will determine how well countries withstand global disruptions.

india_trends.title: Vedanta demerger: When will four spun-off entities of the mining major trade on Dalal Street? CEO answers
india_trends.summary: According to a PTI report, Vedanta Resources CEO Deshnee Naidoo said that its India arm will file with stock exchanges next week for listing approval of its demerged entities.

india_trends.title: Nationwide trial of mobile-based disaster alert systems going on; citizens ignore test message: DoT
india_trends.summary: India is currently testing a new mobile-based disaster alert system. Citizens may receive test messages on their phones. These alerts are part of a nationwide trial by the Department of Telecommunications and the National Disaster Management Authority. The system uses Cell Broadcast technology for r

india_trends.title: Kotak Mahindra Bank Q4 earnings preview: Brokerages see steady NII growth, muted profit expansion
india_trends.summary: Kotak Mahindra Bank will announce its Q4FY26 results on 2 May. Brokerages expect steady growth in net interest income and operating profitability, but subdued net profit due to margin pressure. The stock has gained 8% in April, yet remains down 13% year to date.

india_trends.title: Current growth trajectory paves way for India to be a developed nation by 2047: Jeffrey D Sachs
india_trends.summary: Addressing an event organised by industry body Ficci, Sachs said India is one of the pillars of global stability and global peace, and it should not align with the United States.

india_trends.title: Govt mulls partial credit guarantee, interest subvention support for pvt sector electric bus, truck adoption
india_trends.summary: The heavy industries ministry is consulting stakeholders on partial credit guarantees and interest subsidies to make electric buses and trucks affordable for private operators, who run 90% of the country's buses but have been excluded from existing federal electric vehicle incentive schemes.

india_trends.title: Exclusive: Casagrand to add 3.98 mn sq ft in Hyderabad, launch its second-largest residential project 'Casagrand Vybe'
india_trends.summary: Casagrand is boosting its Hyderabad presence with 3.98 million square feet of new developments. The company is launching 'Casagrand Vybe', its largest residential project in the city. This expansion is fueled by high demand for luxury and premium homes. Hyderabad is becoming a key market for the dev

india_trends.title: Govt develops export monitoring framework to meet FY31 $2 trillion export target
india_trends.summary: India aims for $2 trillion in exports by 2030-31. The Commerce Department has created a detailed plan. This framework targets sectors like engineering, textiles, and services. Key performance indicators and timelines will guide progress. Inter-departmental coordination is crucial. An IT platform wil

india_trends.title: Govt deliberates on financing mechanism to push adoption of e-bus, e-truck in private sector
india_trends.summary: The Ministry of Heavy Industries convened a high-level meeting to explore financing mechanisms for accelerating private sector adoption of electric buses and trucks. Discussions focused on identifying and addressing challenges in EV financing, with participation from financial institutions, banks, N

india_trends.title: Siguler Guff invests $40 million in Cinnabon operator Trimex Foods
india_trends.summary: US private equity firm Siguler Guff has invested $40 million in Trimex Foods, the Indian franchise partner for Chili's, Paul, and Cinnabon. This strategic investment aims to accelerate Trimex's pan-India expansion and onboard new global brands, reflecting strong conviction in India's growing organiz

india_trends.title: Woking on Jan Vishwas bill 3 to further improve business environment: Piyush Goyal
india_trends.summary: India is preparing for a third Jan Vishwas Bill. This initiative aims to simplify business processes and reduce compliance burdens. The government is also focused on making it easier for businesses to start and exit. India has already finalized nine free trade agreements and expects more in the comi

india_trends.title: Kissht IPO: OnEMI raises ₹278 crore from anchor investors ahead of issue
india_trends.summary: The anchor round saw participation from leading domestic mutual funds and global institutions, with shares allotted at the upper price band of ₹171.

india_trends.title: Dr Reddy’s Laboratories receives approval from Health Canada for its generic semaglutide injection
india_trends.summary: Dr Reddy's Laboratories has achieved a significant milestone. Health Canada has approved its generic semaglutide injection. This makes Dr Reddy's the first company to receive market authorization for this treatment in Canada. The approval covers 2 mg/pen and 4 mg/pen dosages. This development aims t

india_trends.title: Nandini Piramal warns prolonged West Asia war may raise input costs
india_trends.summary: Geopolitical tensions in West Asia are manageable now. However, a prolonged US-Israel war against Iran could raise costs for petrochemical-derived products.
